creator: zphod@berentweb.com
text:
very single upgrade of mozilla-based ports (firefox/seamonkey) breaks
installed xpi extensions. XPI's need to be re-installed (make deinstall/
reinstall) every time. Granted, I now have a script for this, but ftw?
Why do the www/xpi-* ports even exist then?

How-To-Repeat: Upgrade Firefox/Seamonkey
